title: Annmarie Tiller
compiled_truth: Annmarie Tiller is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-11-01 to 2001-05-09), Annmarie Tiller sent 2 and received 135 emails, totalling 137 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (2), [Brent Vasconcellos](people/brent-vasconcellos) (2), [Clint Freeland](people/clint-freeland) (1), [Gareth Bahlmann](people/gareth-bahlmann) (1), [Rastin](people/rastin-velaw) (1).
